home.hero_description_2: Build your emotional map and discover new routes for your well-being.

home.section_popular_sub: The content that helped other readers the most.
home.section_how_sub: Four steps to know yourself better.

common.disclaimer: Educational content. Does not replace professional evaluation.
common.disclaimer_full: This content is educational and informational. It does not replace evaluation, diagnosis or treatment by a qualified mental health professional. In an emergency, call CVV 188 or SAMU 192.
common.disclaimer_quiz: This quiz is educational and for self-knowledge. It does not constitute clinical diagnosis nor replace professional evaluation.

pro.page_subtitle: Access advanced self-knowledge tools, ad-free, with a complete dashboard and much more.
pro.unlock_desc: Unlock with a PRO subscription to access this content.
pro.unlock_desc_full: Get the most out of ValidZen. Create your free account or subscribe to PRO for unlimited content, your full emotional map, and much more.
pro.faq_cancel_a: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your PRO access continues until the end of the paid period.
pro.faq_guarantee_a: If you're not satisfied within the first 7 days, cancel and get a full refund, no questions asked.
pro.faq_data_q: Is my quiz data kept if I cancel?
pro.faq_data_a: Yes! All your results and history are saved. You go back to FREE access, but your data remains.
pro.quiz_limit_desc: Free users can take up to 5 simple quizzes. Unlock unlimited quizzes and deep assessments with PRO!
pro.global_quiz_locked: The Complete Quiz is an exclusive tool for PRO subscribers.
pro.quizzes_subtitle: Explore our full catalog of self-knowledge tools.
